note: Real tasks drawn from session history, not synthetic

evals.name: fusion-extension-eval
evals.prompt: I'm considering installing @runfusion/fusion as a Pi extension. Explore the GitHub repo (https://github.com/Runfusion/Fusion), estimate the actual system prompt token cost, and assess the bloat:benefit ratio. Should I install it? Give me evidence, not guesses.
evals.expected_output: Evidence Pack with claims sourced from the repo (README, package.json, source files), possibly web search for community feedback. Grounded Plan with clear install/don't-install decision. Should classify as medium uncertainty.

evals.name: nocodb-vs-teable
evals.prompt: I need to set up a self-hosted project tracker for a 2-person team. NocoDB and Teable are both options. Research both and help me decide which to use — I care about: easy local Docker setup, real-time collaboration, and free tier features. Don't just guess — give me evidence for each claim.
evals.expected_output: Evidence Pack comparing NocoDB and Teable across the 3 criteria. Grounded Plan with a clear recommendation. Should classify as high uncertainty (comparing tools requires multiple sources).

evals.name: jira-forge-pricing
evals.prompt: I'm building a Jira Forge app and need to understand the pricing and cost model. What are the Forge infrastructure costs, Atlassian marketplace fees, and free tier limits? I need facts, not assumptions — this affects our business model.
evals.expected_output: Evidence Pack citing Atlassian docs (Context7 or web), marketplace terms, and Forge pricing page. Grounded Plan with cost estimates. Should classify as medium uncertainty — docs exist but are scattered.
